content.content:
1	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
2	import { ref } from 'vue'
3	import * as chatApi from '@/api/chat'
4	import type { Conversation, Message } from '@/types'
5	
6	export const useChatStore = defineStore('chat', () => {
7	  const conversations = ref<Conversation[]>([])
8	  const currentConversation = ref<Conversation | null>(null)
9	  const messages = ref<Message[]>([])
10	  const loading = ref(false)
11	  const streaming = ref(false)
12	  const streamingContent = ref('')
13	
14	  async function loadConversations() {
15	    try {
16	      const res = await chatApi.getConversations()
17	      conversations.value = res.data.data
18	    } catch {
19	      conversations.value = []
20	    }
21	  }
22	
23	  async function selectConversation(conv: Conversation) {
24	    currentConversation.value = conv
25	    loading.value = true
26	    try {
27	      const res = await chatApi.getMessages(conv.id)
28	      messages.value = res.data.data
29	    } catch {
30	      messages.value = []
31	    } finally {
32	      loading.value = false
33	    }
34	  }
35	
36	  function newConversation() {
37	    currentConversation.value = null
38	    messages.value = []
39	  }
40	
41	  function sendMessage(content: string) {
42	    // Add user message immediately
43	    const userMessage: Message = {
44	      id: Date.now(),
45	      conversationId: currentConversation.value?.id ?? 0,
46	      role: 'user',
47	      content,
48	      sources: [],
49	      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
50	    }
51	    messages.value.push(userMessage)
52	
53	    // Add placeholder assistant message
54	    streaming.value = true
55	    streamingContent.value = ''
56	    const assistantMessage: Message = {
57	      id: Date.now() + 1,
58	      conversationId: currentConversation.value?.id ?? 0,
59	      role: 'assistant',
60	      content: '',
61	      sources: [],
62	      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
63	    }
64	    messages.value.push(assistantMessage)
65	
66	    let fullContent = ''
67	
68	    const controller = chatApi.sendMessageSSE(
69	      currentConversation.value?.id ?? null,
70	      content,
71	      (chunk: string) => {
72	        fullContent += chunk
73	        streamingContent.value = fullContent
74	        const lastMsg = messages.value[messages.value.length - 1]
75	        if (lastMsg && lastMsg.role === 'assistant') {
76	          lastMsg.content = fullContent
77	        }
78	      },
79	      () => {
80	        streaming.value = false
81	        streamingContent.value = ''
82	        // Reload conversations to get updated list (new conversation title etc.)
83	        loadConversations()
84	      },
85	      (err: string) => {
86	        const lastMsg = messages.value[messages.value.length - 1]
87	        if (lastMsg && lastMsg.role === 'assistant') {
88	          lastMsg.content = `错误: ${err}`
89	        }
90	        streaming.value = false
91	        streamingContent.value = ''
92	      },
93	    )
94	
95	    return controller
96	  }
97	
98	  async function deleteConversation(convId: number) {
99	    await chatApi.deleteConversation(convId)
100	    conversations.value = conversations.value.filter((c) => c.id !== convId)
101	    if (currentConversation.value?.id === convId) {
102	      currentConversation.value = null
103	      messages.value = []
104	    }
105	  }
106	
107	  return {
108	    conversations,
109	    currentConversation,
110	    messages,
111	    loading,
112	    streaming,
113	    streamingContent,
114	    loadConversations,
115	    selectConversation,
116	    newConversation,
117	    sendMessage,
118	    deleteConversation,
119	  }
120	})
